loyaltyModes.title: One page.

loyaltyModes.seoDesc: Your salon page is indexed in your city. Clients searching for a salon near them find you directly.
loyaltyModes.seoMockupDesc: Loyalty program, welcome offer, client reviews. Nail technician in Paris 11th.
loyaltyModes.welcomeDesc: Set up an offer in 30 seconds. New clients discover it on your page, sign up, and come back.
loyaltyModes.reviewsDesc: We ask for a review at the right time. More reviews = more visibility = more clients finding you.
loyaltyModes.referralDesc: Your clients refer their friends. Both get rewarded. Every happy client brings you new ones.

comparison.title: Already on Planity, Booksy, or managing solo?
comparison.colA1: Keep your platform for appointments and POS. Qarte doesn't replace anything.
comparison.colA2: Add a loyalty program your clients will love (stamps or cashback).
comparison.colA3: Create your storefront in one link — Instagram bio, Google My Business, everywhere.
comparison.colA4: Convert new visitors with an automatic welcome offer.
comparison.colB1: Your pro page replaces a website — services, hours, photos, reviews.
comparison.colB2: Clients contact you directly (WhatsApp, phone, DM). You chat before booking a slot.
comparison.colB3: Publish your availability, they see when you're free. Simple, no robots.
comparison.colB4: Build loyalty effortlessly — QR code, auto reminders, Google reviews.
comparison.feat_qrcode: Custom QR Code + Social media kit
comparison.includedNote: Qarte is not a booking platform. It's a complementary tool for pros who want to attract and retain clients.
comparison.philoText: At Qarte, we believe great service starts with a conversation. Your clients reach out, you understand their needs, you suggest the right time. No automatic booking without discussion — because every client is different.

testimonials.title: They say it
testimonials.subtitle: What beauty pros using Qarte every day have to say.
testimonials.t1Text: My Qarte page as my Instagram bio link and that's it. Services, hours, booking, loyalty — all in one!
testimonials.t2Text: My clients spend between $30 and $120, stamps didn't feel right. The cashback motivates them to come back!
testimonials.t3Text: The welcome offer converts instantly and referrals do the rest. I should have signed up sooner.
testimonials.t4Title: Google reviews come in on their own.
testimonials.t4Text: It's automatic after the scan — my clients leave a review without me having to push.
testimonials.t5Text: My clients scan the QR and they're set. Reward notifications bring them back on their own.

faq.title: We answer
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: How long does it take to get started?
faq.a1: 5 minutes. Account, logo, loyalty reward. Your salon page is live, your QR code is ready.
faq.q2: Will my clients find it complicated?
faq.a2: They scan the QR code with their camera, that's it. No app to download, no account to create.
faq.a3: Fixed-price services (nails, lashes, barber) → stamp mode. Variable amounts (hair, spa) → cashback mode. You can switch anytime.
faq.q4: How do referrals and the welcome offer work?
faq.a4: Your clients share a code with friends. The new client gets a voucher, the referrer too. The welcome offer shows on your page to convert new visitors. Fully automatic.
faq.q5: Does the price change after the 7-day trial?
faq.a5: No. $19/month or $190/year, same features during trial and after. No credit card to start.
faq.a6: 100% GDPR compliant, hosted in Europe, encrypted. We never resell anything. CSV export in 1 click if you leave.
faq.q7: Does it work for freelancers and home services?
faq.a7: Yes. Show the QR code on your phone, your client scans it, their visit is recorded. Your salon page replaces the website you never had time to build.
faq.q8: I'm already on Planity or Booksy — is it compatible?
faq.a8: Yes, Qarte is complementary. Keep your platform for bookings and POS. Use Qarte for loyalty, your storefront, and the welcome offer. Add your Qarte link to your Google My Business and Instagram bio — your clients find everything in one place.
faq.whatsappTitle: Have a question? Message us directly.

subscription.faqA4: None. You can cancel in 1 click, no justification, no hidden fees.

boutique.metaTitle: Qarte NFC Card — Loyalty in a tap
boutique.metaDescription: The Qarte NFC card opens the loyalty page with a single tap. No QR code needed. $20, delivery within 1-2 weeks.
boutique.heroDescription: Replaces the QR code. Place it on the counter or wear it around your neck — your client taps and accesses their loyalty card.
boutique.step1Desc: On the counter or around your neck — always within reach.
boutique.step2Desc: The loyalty page opens directly in their browser, no QR code scan needed.
boutique.step3Desc: They enter their number (or are recognized) and their loyalty point is recorded.

pricingMeta.title: Pricing — Salon page & loyalty all-inclusive from $19/month
pricingMeta.description: One price for everything: your salon page (bio, services, schedule, photos) and loyalty program (stamps, cashback, auto follow-ups, Google reviews). Free 7-day trial, no credit card required.
